executives.name: Dale Corman
executives.background: Mr. Corman has over 50 years of experience in mineral exploration and development. He was previously the Chairman and CEO of Western Silver Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Raymond Threlkeld
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Threlkeld has over 40 years of experience in the mining industry. He was previously the President and CEO of Rainy River Resources and held senior roles at Barrick Gold.

board_of_directors.name: Ross Beaty
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Beaty is a geologist and resource entrepreneur with over 45 years of experience in the international minerals and renewable energy industries. He founded Pan American Silver Corp. and Alterra Power Corp.

board_of_directors.name: Dale Corman
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Corman has over 50 years of experience in mineral exploration and development. He was previously the Chairman and CEO of Western Silver Corporation.
